### Post by SnowPunk98 on 2008-09-11
I upgraded to Ubuntu 8.10 and went to remove some old Nvidia packages since I should not have anything Nvidia on this system anymore. When I logged back in everything was messed up looking, see attached image.

Can someone tell me how I can see which packages I removed now that they are gone or how to resolve this another way?
